type: ACCEPT

note: Same file is unavoidable. I will NOT touch DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader, or any path_transform logic. If our diffs land near each other in __init__/get_source, keep edits as separate added lines/params so both apply cleanly. OK?
